power.active.label: Current power plan
power.err.generic: The operation failed. Please try again.
power.preset.balanced.detail: Balances performance and energy use — the recommended default for everyday use.
power.preset.balanced.title: Balanced
power.preset.high.detail: Aggressive scheduling; the CPU stays at high clocks for more performance (higher power and heat).
power.preset.high.title: High performance
power.preset.saver.detail: Lowers CPU clocks and screen brightness to save the most power and cut heat and noise.
power.preset.saver.title: Power saver
power.preset.ultimate.detail: Builds on High performance to further remove micro-latencies — ultimate performance for workstations (unlock first).
power.preset.ultimate.title: Ultimate performance
power.subtitle: Manage power-scheduling and efficiency policies: switch between Power saver, Balanced, High performance and Ultimate performance in one click (no admin required).
power.title: Power & Efficiency
power.ultimate.unlockConfirm: “Ultimate performance” is a hidden Windows power plan. It will be unlocked and registered on this PC first, then applied. Continue?
